title: table — the definition of one user-commissioned table
description: The meta-record TableThat is built on: a user's table is data, not workspace structure. The columns array is the user's emergent schema — grown by Build, extended by Enrich — while this schema itself never changes. Cross-record rules (values conform to columns, provenance coverage) live in tools/validate.py integrity_checks().

description.description: What this table is for, in the user's terms — the intent Build inferred the columns from.

key.description: The key rows use in their values and provenance maps.

required.description: When true, every row must carry a non-null value for this column.

bottom_line.description: The latest plain-language synthesis of what the table says — refreshed after material changes (OVERVIEW rule 6).
